message:
fix(orchestration): only transition to Recovering phase from Bootstrap on Replay work

The Replay work kind unconditionally set the phase to Recovering, which could
regress the phase if the orchestrator had already advanced past Bootstrap
(e.g., to Steady or Recovering from a different trigger). Now only transitions
to Recovering when still in Bootstrap phase, preventing incorrect phase
regressions during concurrent work dispatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
